name: Top List
description: Ranked countdown list format like top 5, top 10, ranking best to worst. Numbered items with dramatic reveals building to the number one spot.

structure.hook_rule: Tease the NUMBER ONE item immediately: 'Number one on this list will SHOCK you.' or 'The top spot goes to something nobody expected.' Then start from the bottom of the list.
structure.pacing_rule: Count down from the last number to number one. Each item gets a brief reveal with ONE killer detail. Use 'But wait...' transitions between items. Spend the MOST time on number one.
structure.ending_rule: After revealing number one, add a twist: 'But there is actually a secret number zero that nobody talks about...' or loop back: 'And that is why number one connects back to everything else on this list.'
structure.tone: Energetic countdown host, building excitement with each number
transitions: Nhưng đó chưa phải số một...
Và ở vị trí tiếp theo...
Nhưng chờ đã, số một mới thực sự điên rồ...

prompt_injection: FORMAT: Numbered countdown list. Start by teasing the number one pick, then count down from the bottom. Each item needs ONE memorable detail, not a paragraph. Build drama toward number one. The number one reveal should feel like a mic drop. Use natural counting transitions, not robotic 'Number 5 is...' format. Make it conversational.
example_hook_en: Number one on this list made me rethink everything. Let us start from the bottom.
example_hook_vi: Số một trong danh sách này sẽ khiến bạn phải suy nghĩ lại tất cả. Hãy bắt đầu từ cuối danh sách.
